name: Edward Bowes
abstract: Edward J. Bowes (June 14, 1874 – June 13, 1946), professionally known as Major Edward Bowes, was an American  radio personality, theatrical manager, and film executive.

about_quotes.speaker: Chauncey Morehouse
about_quotes.evidence: A drummer with Major Bowes on the Sunday Morning Capitol Theater Family, Morehouse has played drum specialties several times

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Gibbs
about_quotes.evidence: as a result since I was 12 years old, when I was 12 I went on the road with Major Bowes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terry Gibbs interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 5, 2021 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Tiny Grimes
about_quotes.evidence: So we finally got to New York on a Major Bowes Show... So we were one of the groups.
